steps.title: Substitute to solve for x
steps.content:
Since $y = 3x + 9$ is already isolated, substitute into $3y = 8x - 6$:

$$3(3x + 9) = 8x - 6$$
$$9x + 27 = 8x - 6$$
$$x = -33$$

steps.title: Find y and calculate x - y
steps.content:
Substitute $x = -33$ into the first equation:
$$y = 3(-33) + 9 = -99 + 9 = -90$$

Calculate $x - y$:
$$x - y = -33 - (-90) = 57$$

That matches choice D — D is correct.
